selection_summary: candidate_08 has the strongest all-around novel engine in the field: filthy procedural texture, a long arc of institutional complicity, a brutally clean family trigger, and consequences that stay personal, political, and infrastructural at once. It feels both durable and scene-rich without relying on prestige-safe caution or on decorative extremity.
anti_bias_statement: Risk profile or genre mode was not treated as a defect in itself; comedy, horror, erotic charge, speculation, and formal strangeness were judged only by whether they deepened the premise engine rather than by how safe or prestigious they looked.
